title: Custom URL Links for Non-Salesforce Reports and Dashboards
story: As a data analyst, I want to add custom URL links to non-Salesforce reports and dashboards within the metric detail panel, so that I can organize all related analytics assets in one place regardless of their source platform.
description:
Extends the Reports and Dashboards tabs in the metric sidebar to support custom URL links alongside Salesforce-sourced items. Users can add custom links with a label and URL, which appear in the same list as Salesforce reports/dashboards. This accommodates customers using reporting tools beyond Salesforce (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, custom dashboards).

Custom links have add, edit, and delete capabilities. URL validation ensures the link is a valid URL. The data model is designed to be extensible for future integration with other reporting platforms.
acceptance_criteria: User can add a custom link with label and URL to the Reports tab
User can add a custom link with label and URL to the Dashboards tab
Custom links appear alongside Salesforce-sourced items in the list
Custom links have edit and delete actions (Salesforce items do not)
URL field validates that the input is a valid URL
Custom links persist and display correctly across page reloads
ux_changes: Add Custom Link button on Reports and Dashboards tabs. Popup form for label and URL entry. Edit and remove icons on custom links only. Toaster confirmation on save.
middleware_changes: CRUD service for custom link management associated with metric-report/dashboard relationships.
data_model_changes: New model for custom report/dashboard links with label, URL, and metric foreign key. Designed to be extensible with additional metadata fields.
api_changes: CRUD endpoints for custom link management on both reports and dashboards.
implementation_notes: Custom links use a separate data model from Salesforce-sourced items to avoid polluting the Salesforce metadata tables. The list is co-mingled visually but backed by different models. Edit functionality is only available for custom links.
comment_summary: Initial implementation added per-row link icons, but intent was clarified to be about adding new custom links alongside Salesforce items. Developer implemented add/edit/delete for custom links on both reports and dashboards tabs. Approved enthusiastically.
